tasks.title: 项目初始化：Next.js 15 + TS strict + Tailwind v4 + shadcn/ui
tasks.description: 使用 pnpm 创建 Next.js 15 App Router 项目，启用 TypeScript strict，集成 Tailwind CSS v4（@theme in CSS）和 shadcn/ui 基础组件，配置 ESLint/Prettier，搭建基础目录骨架（app/、lib/、components/、stores/、hooks/、tests/）。
tasks.details: 1) `pnpm create next-app@latest prisim-r2 --typescript --app --tailwind --eslint`；2) tsconfig 设 strict: true、noUncheckedIndexedAccess、noImplicitOverride；3) Tailwind v4 用 `@import 'tailwindcss';` 和 `@theme {}` 在 `app/globals.css`，不要 tailwind.config.js；4) `pnpm dlx shadcn@latest init`，添加 button/input/dialog/table/dropdown-menu/toast/tabs/badge/progress 等基础组件到 components/ui/；5) 安装 zustand、@tanstack/react-query、zod、ulid、@aws-sdk/client-s3、@aws-sdk/s3-request-presigner（pin 精确版本）；6) 创建空目录：app/(auth)、app/(dashboard)、app/api/、lib/crypto、lib/r2、lib/db、lib/auth、lib/audit、lib/api、components/features、stores、hooks、tests/unit、tests/e2e；7) 在 .gitignore 添加 .dev.vars、.env.local、.wrangler/。
tasks.testStrategy: 运行 `pnpm dev` 应在 3000 端口起服务，访问 `/` 渲染默认页面；`pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint` 均无错误；shadcn 按钮组件能正常渲染。

subtasks.title: Create the Next.js 15 App Router project and enable strict TypeScript settings
subtasks.description: Scaffold the pnpm-based Next.js project, verify App Router setup, and harden tsconfig with the required strict compiler options.
subtasks.details:
Run `pnpm create next-app@latest prisim-r2 --typescript --app --tailwind --eslint` and enter the project directory with `cd prisim-r2`. Update `tsconfig.json` to ensure `"strict": true`, `"noUncheckedIndexedAccess": true`, and `"noImplicitOverride": true` are explicitly enabled under `compilerOptions`. Confirm the app uses the `app/` directory and keep the default Next.js 15 App Router structure intact.
<info added on 2026-05-20T11:37:41.607Z>
Implementation notes (2026-05-20):

Decision: manually scaffolded the project instead of running `pnpm create next-app@latest`, because the working tree already contained design mockups from a prior session (`app/globals.css` with Tailwind v4 tokens, `app/(auth)/login/page.tsx`, `components/layout/app-shell.tsx`, `components/features/{connections,upload,files}/*.tsx`, `lib/utils.ts`) and the CLI would either refuse the non-empty directory or overwrite them. The user explicitly confirmed the "scaffold preserving mockups" path.

Files written:
- `package.json`: added `next ^15.4.0`, `react ^19.1.0`, `react-dom ^19.1.0`, `typescript ^5.7.2`, `@types/node`, `@types/react`, `@types/react-dom`, plus scripts `dev`, `build`, `start`, `lint`, `typecheck`. Other runtime dependencies (`zustand`, `@tanstack/react-query`, AWS SDK packages, `zod`, `ulid`) are intentionally deferred to subtask 1.4.
- `tsconfig.json`: enabled `strict`, `noUncheckedIndexedAccess`, `noImplicitOverride`, set `moduleResolution: bundler`, `jsx: preserve`, path alias `@/* -> ./*`, and the Next TypeScript plugin.
- `next.config.ts`: minimal `NextConfig` with `reactStrictMode`.
- `next-env.d.ts`: standard Next.js reference file.
- `app/layout.tsx`: minimal `RootLayout` that imports `./globals.css` so the existing design tokens remain active.
- `app/page.tsx`: placeholder landing page with a link to `/login`.

Preserved untouched: `app/globals.css`, `app/(auth)/login/page.tsx`, `components/**/*`, `lib/utils.ts`, `.env`.

Pitfalls / deferred validation:
1. `pnpm dev` will not start until subtask 1.2 adds Tailwind v4 PostCSS support (`@tailwindcss/postcss` and `postcss.config.mjs`), because the existing `globals.css` already contains `@import "tailwindcss";`.
2. `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit` requires `pnpm install` first; dependency installation is bundled into subtask 1.4 to avoid duplicate install passes. The `tsconfig.json` content itself was manually verified.
3. The existing `lib/utils.ts` likely depends on `clsx` and/or `tailwind-merge` in the usual shadcn pattern; those are expected to land in subtask 1.3 with `pnpm dlx shadcn@latest init`, so imports of `@/lib/utils` may not typecheck until then.

Alternatives considered:
- Running `pnpm create next-app . --typescript --app --tailwind --eslint --import-alias "@/*"` after temporarily backing up mockups was rejected as more error-prone than writing the small scaffold files directly.
- Omitting `app/page.tsx` and relying only on `app/(auth)/login/page.tsx` was rejected because `/` would 404, while this subtask’s smoke-test expectation is that visiting `/` renders a page.

Current status: the acceptance criteria for this subtask are met with respect to project scaffold presence and strict TypeScript settings. Runtime validation (`pnpm dev`, green typecheck) remains blocked on subtask 1.2 and subtask 1.4.
</info added on 2026-05-20T11:37:41.607Z>
subtasks.testStrategy: Run `pnpm dev` and confirm the app starts on localhost:3000 and the default `/` page renders. Run `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit` to verify the strict TypeScript configuration passes without errors.

subtasks.title: Configure Tailwind CSS v4 via app/globals.css using @import and @theme
subtasks.description: Adjust the default styling setup to use Tailwind CSS v4's CSS-first configuration without any tailwind.config.js file.
subtasks.details:
Ensure there is no `tailwind.config.js` or `tailwind.config.ts` in the repository. Edit `app/globals.css` to use Tailwind v4 syntax, starting with `@import 'tailwindcss';` and define design tokens with an `@theme { ... }` block. Keep global resets and base app styles in this file as needed for the project. Do not move theme tokens into JS config files because this task requires CSS-based Tailwind v4 configuration only.
<info added on 2026-05-20T12:10:40.615Z>
Implementation verified against current Tailwind v4 docs (v4.3 line). Installed and resolved `tailwindcss` 4.3.0, `@tailwindcss/postcss` 4.3.0, and explicit `postcss` 8.5.15 per v4 install requirements. Created `postcss.config.mjs` with a single plugin entry for `@tailwindcss/postcss`; no `postcss-import` or `autoprefixer` is needed in v4 because those behaviors are folded into the Tailwind PostCSS plugin.

`app/globals.css` required no changes because it already used valid v4 syntax: `@import "tailwindcss";`, the existing `@custom-variant dark (&:where(.dark, .dark *));`, and an `@theme inline { ... }` block mapping CSS variables to Tailwind tokens. Confirmed that no `tailwind.config.js` or `tailwind.config.ts` exists, preserving the required CSS-first configuration.

Verification performed: `pnpm install` succeeded, `pnpm dev` started Next.js 15.5.18 successfully, and the served compiled CSS at `/_next/static/css/app/layout.css` contained utilities used by `app/page.tsx` including `mx-auto`, `min-h-screen`, `max-w-2xl`, `flex`, and `text-primary`. Presence of `text-primary` confirms semantic token generation from the `@theme inline` mapping (`--color-primary` -> `var(--primary)`) is working end-to-end.

Expected side effect: Next.js updated `next-env.d.ts` on first dev start to include the typed-routes reference path; this is normal for Next 15. Not in scope for this subtask: the Google Fonts `@import url(...)` in `globals.css` still works but should later be migrated to `next/font/google`, and `lib/utils.ts` may still reference `clsx`/`tailwind-merge` until shadcn initialization in subtask 1.3. Acceptance criteria for this subtask are met: dev server compiles, utilities are generated from `globals.css`, and no v3-style Tailwind config file is present.
</info added on 2026-05-20T12:10:40.615Z>
subtasks.testStrategy: Run `pnpm dev` and confirm styles compile successfully. Add a temporary Tailwind utility class to `app/page.tsx` such as `className="p-8 text-2xl"` and verify the styling is applied in the browser. Confirm no Tailwind config file exists.

subtasks.title: Initialize shadcn/ui and generate the baseline UI components into components/ui
subtasks.description: Set up shadcn/ui for the project and add the required reusable base components using the generator instead of manual edits.
subtasks.details:
Run `pnpm dlx shadcn@latest init` and configure it to place components under `components/ui/` with the project's Tailwind and App Router settings. Then generate the required components with shadcn commands, including at minimum: `button`, `input`, `dialog`, `table`, `dropdown-menu`, `toast`, `tabs`, `badge`, and `progress`. Do not handcraft files inside `components/ui/`; if a component is wrong, regenerate it through the CLI. Ensure any required support files such as `components.json` and utility helpers expected by shadcn are created correctly.
<info added on 2026-05-20T12:32:01.722Z>
Implementation note: instead of running the interactive `pnpm dlx shadcn@latest init` wizard, `components.json` was created manually to avoid overwriting the customized `app/globals.css` design tokens and the extended `lib/utils.ts` helpers that must be preserved from the mockups.

`components.json` was verified against the current shadcn v4 schema and configured as: `style: "new-york"`, `tailwind.config: ""`, `tailwind.css: "app/globals.css"`, `baseColor: "stone"`, `rsc: true`, `tsx: true`, `iconLibrary: "lucide"`, with aliases aligned to `tsconfig.json` (`@/*` → `./*`) for components, utils, ui, lib, and hooks.

Installed required runtime/peer dependencies via `pnpm add`: `clsx@2.1.1`, `tailwind-merge@3.6.0`, `class-variance-authority@0.7.1`, `lucide-react@1.16.0`, and `tw-animate-css@1.4.0`. The shadcn add flow also pulled in runtime dependencies including `sonner`, `next-themes`, and the needed `@radix-ui/react-*` packages, all kept in `dependencies` because they ship to the client.

Generated components through `pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add` only, with no manual edits to primitives. Files created under `components/ui/`: `button.tsx`, `input.tsx`, `dialog.tsx`, `table.tsx`, `dropdown-menu.tsx`, `sonner.tsx`, `tabs.tsx`, `badge.tsx`, `progress.tsx`, and `label.tsx`.

Component substitution note: the original `toast` requirement is satisfied by `sonner`, which replaced the legacy shadcn Toast. `label` was also added as a needed baseline form primitive for the existing login mockup.

Verification completed:
`app/globals.css` remained unchanged after shadcn generation.
`pnpm typecheck` passed across the existing mockups and all generated components.
`pnpm dev` served `/` successfully.
Rendered Button output and compiled CSS confirmed semantic utility classes resolve correctly through the existing Tailwind v4 `@theme inline` tokens.

As a persistent smoke test, `app/page.tsx` now renders two Buttons (`default` and `outline`). This is temporary and can be replaced by dashboard routes in later tasks.

Notes for follow-up tasks: shadcn v4 components include `data-slot` attributes that can be used as stable Playwright selectors; `border-input` utilities depend on the existing `--input` token in `globals.css`; when toast notifications are wired later, mount the Sonner toaster in the root layout; monitor bundle size impact from the added Radix runtime packages if client payload becomes a concern.
</info added on 2026-05-20T12:32:01.722Z>
subtasks.testStrategy: Create a temporary test render on `app/page.tsx` using the generated `Button` component and confirm it renders. Verify the expected files exist under `components/ui/` and that `pnpm lint` and `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit` complete without component import errors.

subtasks.title: Install core runtime dependencies with exact pinned versions for app, validation, state, and AWS SDK
subtasks.description: Add the MVP runtime libraries and ensure security-sensitive packages are version-pinned without range prefixes.
subtasks.details:
Install the required dependencies using exact versions, for example with `pnpm add --save-exact zustand @tanstack/react-query zod ulid @aws-sdk/client-s3 @aws-sdk/s3-request-presigner`. Confirm `package.json` writes exact versions with no `^` or `~` prefix, especially for `@aws-sdk/*` packages and other security-relevant runtime packages. Keep dependency additions limited to runtime libraries in this subtask; formatting and script setup belongs elsewhere.
<info added on 2026-05-20T12:33:40.735Z>
Installed the required runtime dependencies with exact pinned versions via `pnpm add --save-exact`: `@aws-sdk/client-s3@3.1050.0`, `@aws-sdk/s3-request-presigner@3.1050.0`, `@tanstack/react-query@5.100.11`, `ulid@3.0.2`, `zod@4.4.3`, and `zustand@5.0.13`. Confirmed all six are written to `dependencies` without `^` or `~`, satisfying the CLAUDE.md security invariant for exact pinning of `@aws-sdk/*` and related security-relevant runtime packages. No separate crypto dependency was added because runtime crypto helpers will use the platform Web Crypto API (`crypto.subtle`).

Verified `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile` completes cleanly and the lockfile matches `package.json`. Verified `pnpm typecheck` still passes under strict TypeScript settings, with no new `@types` issues since these packages ship their own types.

Compatibility notes for downstream tasks: `zod` is now v4, so older v3 patterns such as `z.string().nonempty()` must be replaced with `z.string().min(1)` and some `.default()` behavior differs; `zustand` v5 has tighter middleware typings and changed some React utility assumptions; `@tanstack/react-query` v5 requires the object-style mutation/query APIs rather than legacy v4 positional forms. For AWS SDK usage, always construct S3 clients with explicit credentials and avoid fs-based credential providers such as `fromIni`, which are not appropriate for Workers/Pages runtimes. Also keep imports command-scoped in later R2 helpers to limit bundle size impact from `@aws-sdk/client-s3`.

Acceptance for subtask 1.4 is met: all required MVP runtime libraries are installed, exact-pinned where required, lockfile is consistent, and types remain clean.
</info added on 2026-05-20T12:33:40.735Z>
subtasks.testStrategy: Inspect `package.json` to verify exact version strings are present. Run `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile` or a clean `pnpm install` to confirm lockfile consistency, then run `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit` to ensure the added packages do not introduce type issues.

subtasks.title: Configure ESLint, Prettier, and package scripts for typecheck, lint, and formatting
subtasks.description: Finalize code quality tooling by ensuring linting, formatting, and validation scripts are available and compatible with the initialized Next.js project.
subtasks.details:
Keep the Next.js ESLint setup from scaffolding, then add Prettier integration and define package scripts in `package.json` such as `"typecheck": "tsc --noEmit"`, `"lint": "next lint"` or the Next.js 15-compatible lint command already used by the project, and `"format": "prettier --write ."`. Add any needed Prettier config file such as `.prettierrc` and optional ignore file `.prettierignore`. Ensure the script set supports routine validation for this MVP baseline.
<info added on 2026-05-20T12:41:40.787Z>
Implemented ESLint + Prettier tooling per current Next.js 15 docs using flat-config ESLint and Prettier integration. Added devDependencies with caret ranges and validated resolved versions: eslint 9.39.4, eslint-config-next 16.2.6, eslint-config-prettier 10.1.8, prettier 3.8.3.

Created `eslint.config.mjs` as ESM flat config using `eslint-config-next/core-web-vitals`, `eslint-config-next/typescript`, and `eslint-config-prettier/flat` in that order, with Prettier last to disable conflicting rules. Added global ignores for `.next/**`, `out/**`, `build/**`, `coverage/**`, `playwright-report/**`, `test-results/**`, `next-env.d.ts`, and `node_modules/**`.

Added `.prettierrc` with 80 character print width, double quotes, semicolons, trailing commas `all`, 2-space indentation, and LF line endings. Added `.prettierignore` for standard generated/build directories plus `components/ui` so shadcn-generated primitives are not hand-reformatted and can be safely regenerated by the CLI without noisy diffs.

Updated `package.json` scripts so linting uses the ESLint CLI instead of deprecated `next lint`: `lint: "eslint ."`, plus `lint:fix`, `format`, and `format:check`. `typecheck` remained in place from subtask 1.1.

Resolved an initial compatibility issue where the first install pulled `eslint@10`, which broke a transitive `eslint-plugin-react` path used by `eslint-config-next`; pinning back to `eslint@^9` aligned with the tested peer range and cleared the warnings/errors.

Fixed two pre-existing lint violations in `components/layout/app-shell.tsx`: replaced the brand `<a href="/">` with `next/link`, and changed the `useState([...])` eager initializer containing `Date.now()` to a lazy initializer `useState<Connection[]>(() => [...])` so the impure call is not executed on every render.

Established a clean formatting baseline by ignoring `components/ui` and running Prettier across the remaining files; subsequent `pnpm format:check` passes cleanly.

Validation complete: `pnpm typecheck`, `pnpm lint`, and `pnpm format:check` all pass with no errors. This satisfies the subtask acceptance criteria and completes the parent project-initialization task’s lint/format tooling baseline.
</info added on 2026-05-20T12:41:40.787Z>

tasks.title: Cloudflare Pages + Edge Runtime 配置
tasks.description: 配置 wrangler.toml、next.config.ts 以支持 Cloudflare Pages 部署和 edge runtime；准备 D1 binding；所有 route handler 加 `export const runtime = 'edge'` 规范。
tasks.details: 1) 安装 `wrangler` 和 `@cloudflare/next-on-pages`；2) 创建 wrangler.toml：name、compatibility_date、compatibility_flags=['nodejs_compat']、[[d1_databases]] binding=DB、database_name、database_id；3) next.config.ts 启用 `experimental: { runtime: 'edge' }`（若适用）或确保 route handler 用 edge；4) package.json scripts: dev/build/preview(`wrangler pages dev .vercel/output/static --d1 DB=...`)/deploy(`wrangler pages deploy .vercel/output/static`)；5) 写 `pnpm build` -> `next-on-pages` 流程；6) lib 文件需要服务端时统一 `import 'server-only'`；7) 创建一个示例 `app/api/health/route.ts` 含 `export const runtime = 'edge'` 用于验证。
tasks.testStrategy: `pnpm build` 成功生成 `.vercel/output`；`pnpm preview` 本地启动 wrangler dev 后 `curl localhost:8788/api/health` 返回 200；wrangler dry-run deploy 通过。

tasks.title: D1 数据库 schema 与迁移
tasks.description: 实现 5 张表（users / connections / shares / audit_log / sessions），写迁移脚本（drizzle-kit 或纯 SQL），并提供本地与 production 的执行命令。
tasks.details: 选 drizzle-orm + drizzle-kit（edge 友好、类型安全）。1) `pnpm add drizzle-orm`，`pnpm add -D drizzle-kit @cloudflare/workers-types`；2) 在 lib/db/schema.ts 用 sqliteTable 定义 5 张表，字段照 PRD 第 3 段：users(id ulid PK, email unique, password_hash, external_id, created_at)、connections(id, user_id FK, name, account_id, endpoint, access_key_masked, access_key_ciphertext blob, access_key_iv blob, secret_key_ciphertext blob, secret_key_iv blob, created_at, last_used_at)、shares(id, user_id, connection_id, bucket, object_key, url_hash, ttl_seconds, expires_at, created_at)、audit_log(id, user_id, connection_id, op, bucket, object_key, status, error_msg, ip, ua, created_at)、sessions(id, user_id, token_hash, expires_at, created_at)；3) 索引：idx_connections_user、idx_shares_user_active(user_id, expires_at)、idx_audit_user_time(user_id, created_at DESC)；4) drizzle.config.ts 输出 SQL 到 migrations/；5) scripts: `db:gen`、`db:migrate:local`（wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local）、`db:migrate:prod`；6) lib/db/client.ts 工厂：`export function getDb(env: Env) { return drizzle(env.DB, { schema }); }`。
tasks.testStrategy: `pnpm db:gen` 生成 SQL；`pnpm db:migrate:local` 成功在本地 D1 创建所有表；vitest 单测：在 in-memory better-sqlite3 上跑迁移，校验表/索引存在；插入/读取一行 users 行成功。

subtasks.title: Define the five D1 sqliteTable schemas in lib/db/schema.ts
subtasks.description: Create the Drizzle schema file and implement users, connections, shares, audit_log, and sessions tables exactly matching the PRD field requirements.
subtasks.details:
Use sqliteTable and appropriate Drizzle SQLite column types to model all required fields: users(id ulid PK, email unique, password_hash, external_id, created_at), connections(id, user_id FK, name, account_id, endpoint, access_key_masked, access_key_ciphertext blob, access_key_iv blob, secret_key_ciphertext blob, secret_key_iv blob, created_at, last_used_at), shares(id, user_id, connection_id, bucket, object_key, url_hash, ttl_seconds, expires_at, created_at), audit_log(id, user_id, connection_id, op, bucket, object_key, status, error_msg, ip, ua, created_at), and sessions(id, user_id, token_hash, expires_at, created_at). Preserve naming compatibility with D1/SQLite and export the schema members for downstream use.
<info added on 2026-05-20T13:14:06.552Z>
Implemented lib/db/schema.ts with all five PRD tables using Drizzle’s sqliteTable API. Chosen convention is camelCase TypeScript property names with explicit snake_case SQL column names on every field to preserve the PRD schema exactly while keeping idiomatic JS access.

Column/type decisions:
- All primary keys use text("id").primaryKey() and store ULID strings; ULIDs are generated in application code at insert time via the ulid package rather than a DB default.
- Timestamp fields use integer({ mode: "timestamp" }); createdAt uses $defaultFn(() => new Date()) so callers do not need to pass it explicitly. Nullable vs required timestamp columns follow the PRD semantics, including nullable lastUsedAt and required expiresAt where applicable.
- Secret/cipher fields use blob({ mode: "buffer" }) for access_key_ciphertext, access_key_iv, secret_key_ciphertext, and secret_key_iv to support both Node-based tooling/tests and Workers runtime with nodejs_compat enabled.
- users.email is defined as notNull + unique, relying on SQLite’s implicit unique index.

Foreign keys were implemented inline with .references(..., { onDelete }) in this file:
- connections.user_id -> users.id, ON DELETE CASCADE
- shares.user_id -> users.id, ON DELETE CASCADE
- shares.connection_id -> connections.id, ON DELETE CASCADE
- audit_log.user_id -> users.id, ON DELETE SET NULL
- audit_log.connection_id -> connections.id, ON DELETE SET NULL
- sessions.user_id -> users.id, ON DELETE CASCADE

subtasks.title: Implement the D1 Drizzle client factory in lib/db/client.ts
subtasks.description: Create the shared database client factory that binds the Cloudflare D1 database from Env to the exported Drizzle schema.
subtasks.details:
Implement lib/db/client.ts with export function getDb(env: Env) { return drizzle(env.DB, { schema }); }. Import the generated schema namespace, use the D1-compatible drizzle adapter, and keep the function simple so API routes and server modules can reuse it consistently.
<info added on 2026-05-20T13:29:28.143Z>
Implementation notes (2026-05-20):

`lib/db/client.ts` written per PRD spec:
- `import "server-only"` at the top to prevent accidental Client Component imports. `server-only@0.0.1` added as a devDependency since Next.js enforces this via the RSC compiler split.
- `interface DbEnv { DB: D1Database }` used as the minimal env contract. Full Pages/Workers env composition stays at the route layer; `getDb` only depends on the D1 binding.
- `export type Db = ReturnType<typeof drizzle<typeof schema>>` added so downstream code has a single named database type for annotations.
- `export function getDb(env: DbEnv): Db { return drizzle(env.DB, { schema }); }` implemented exactly per PRD §6.
- Re-exports `schema` so callers can import both from `@/lib/db/client`.

Included a usage docstring showing the canonical edge-route pattern with `getRequestContext()` from `@cloudflare/next-on-pages`:
`const db = getDb(getRequestContext().env as unknown as DbEnv);`

The temporary `as unknown as DbEnv` cast is required because `getRequestContext().env` is currently typed as the full `CloudflareEnv` placeholder. Once a concrete generated or hand-written Env type is added in a later subtask, this cast can be removed.

Validation:
- `pnpm typecheck` passes cleanly
- `pnpm lint`, `pnpm format:check`, and `pnpm test` all pass
- Existing migration test still passes after the schema re-export change

Downstream notes:
- Drizzle D1 clients are cheap wrappers over the request-scoped binding and should not be memoized at module scope.
- For API routes in later tasks, use `const db = getDb(getRequestContext().env);` inside each handler once env typing is in place.
- The `server-only` marker intentionally fails if `@/lib/db/client` is imported from a Client Component.

Acceptance met: subtask 3.6 completed with PRD-specified `getDb(env)` factory, working types, and server-only guard in place.

Parent task 3 wrap-up: all six subtasks complete. Schema, indexes, migrations, scripts, tests, and shared D1 client factory are ready for tasks 4–10.

tasks.title: AES-GCM 凭证加解密模块（Web Crypto）
tasks.description: 实现 lib/crypto/aes-gcm.ts：基于 Web Crypto subtle，AES-GCM-256，每行随机 12 字节 IV，AAD 用 connection.id；导出 encryptCredential / decryptCredential，主密钥从 env ENCRYPTION_KEY (base64, 32 字节) 加载。
tasks.details: 1) 文件首行 `import 'server-only'`；2) `async function importKey(rawBase64: string): Promise<CryptoKey>` 用 `crypto.subtle.importKey('raw', bytes, { name: 'AES-GCM' }, false, ['encrypt','decrypt'])`，缓存在模块级 WeakMap；3) `async function encryptCredential(plaintext: string, aad: string, env): Promise<{iv: Uint8Array, ciphertext: Uint8Array}>`：随机 IV via `crypto.getRandomValues(new Uint8Array(12))`，调用 `subtle.encrypt({ name: 'AES-GCM', iv, additionalData: te.encode(aad) }, key, te.encode(plaintext))`；4) `async function decryptCredential(ciphertext, iv, aad, env): Promise<string>`：tag 校验失败必须抛 `CryptoIntegrityError`（自定义类）；5) 不做密钥派生，主密钥直接来自 env；6) 校验 env ENCRYPTION_KEY 启动时长度 = 32 字节，否则抛错；7) 不写明文凭证到任何日志。
tasks.testStrategy: Vitest 单测：round-trip（加密+解密相等）；不同 IV 对同一 plaintext 产出不同 ciphertext；篡改 1 字节 ciphertext 必抛 CryptoIntegrityError；篡改 AAD 必抛错；plaintext 含 unicode/空字符串均正确。

tasks.title: Auth.js v5 自托管认证（edge + PBKDF2）
tasks.description: 实现登录/登出/会话校验。PBKDF2-SHA256 600k 迭代（OWASP 推荐），自写最小 D1 adapter；不做注册页（单用户应用，通过 seed 脚本加 admin）。
tasks.details: 1) `pnpm add next-auth@beta @auth/core`；2) lib/auth/password.ts：`hashPassword(plain): Promise<string>` 用 subtle PBKDF2-SHA256 600000 iter + 16 字节随机 salt，输出 `pbkdf2$sha256$600000$<salt-b64>$<hash-b64>`；`verifyPassword(plain, stored): Promise<boolean>` 解析后比较（用恒定时间比较）；3) lib/auth/adapter.ts：100 行内自写 D1 adapter，实现 getUser、createSession、getSessionAndUser、deleteSession，sessions.token_hash 存 sha256(token)，不存原始 token；4) lib/auth/config.ts：CredentialsProvider，session strategy = 'database'，cookie sameSite='lax' secure；5) app/(auth)/login/page.tsx + form action POST /api/auth/[...nextauth]；6) scripts/seed-admin.ts：CLI 读取 ADMIN_EMAIL/ADMIN_PASSWORD env，hash 后插入 users + 写 .dev.vars 记录；7) middleware.ts 拦截 /(dashboard) 路径未登录跳 /login。
tasks.testStrategy: Vitest：hashPassword/verifyPassword round-trip 通过、错误密码返回 false、salt 不重复；E2E（Playwright）：访问 /buckets 重定向到 /login；输入错误密码报错；正确密码登录后跳 /buckets；登出后 cookie 失效。

tasks.title: CSRF 保护 + 输入验证中间件
tasks.description: 为所有 POST/PATCH/DELETE 路由强制 X-CSRF-Token 校验；CSRF token 登录时随 session 下发，存 cookie + meta；统一 Zod 输入验证；统一错误响应格式。

tasks.details: 1) app/(dashboard)/buckets/[bucket]/page.tsx 用 searchParams 读 prefix 和 cursor，catch-all 也可；2) hooks/use-objects.ts：useInfiniteQuery，queryKey ['objects', bucket, prefix]，getNextPageParam: lastPage.nextCursor；3) Breadcrumb 组件：解析 prefix 'a/b/c/' -> [a, b, c]，每段点击跳到对应 prefix；4) ObjectTable 组件：列 Checkbox / Name (folder icon for prefix, file icon for object) / Size / Modified / Actions (Download/Share/Preview/Delete)；5) 文件夹点击 push 到子 prefix；6) Load More 按钮触发 fetchNextPage；7) Zustand selectedKeys（Set<string>）跨页保留多选状态，但切换 prefix 清空。
tasks.testStrategy: Playwright E2E：进入 bucket 显示根 prefix 列表；点 folder 进入子 prefix，URL 和面包屑更新；浏览器后退面包屑恢复；多选 checkbox 显示批量删除按钮。

tasks.title: /api/r2/presign 端点
tasks.description: POST /api/r2/presign，输入 { cid, op: 'put'|'get'|'upload-part', bucket, key, ttl?, uploadId?, partNumber? }；服务端解密 -> 生成 presigned URL；ttl 默认 put=15min, get=15min；写一条 audit_log (presign.put/get)。
tasks.details: 1) app/api/r2/presign/route.ts；2) Zod discriminated union by op；3) put -> presignPut(ttl=900)，get -> presignGet(ttl=900)，upload-part -> presignUploadPart(ttl=900)；4) 限流：60/min/user（rate-limit.ts）；5) 返回 { url, expiresAt: Date.now() + ttl*1000 }；6) audit_log.op = `presign.${op==='get'?'get':'put'}`（part 也算 put 类）；7) ttl 上限 7200 (2 小时) 防滥用；8) URL 不入库（避免泄漏）。
tasks.testStrategy: Vitest：3 种 op 各返回合法 presigned URL；ttl 超 7200 返 400；触发限流第 61 次返 429 + Retry-After；audit_log 写入一行。

tasks.title: Multipart 控制面端点（create / complete / abort）
tasks.description: POST /api/r2/multipart/create、/complete、/abort。这是 Security Invariant #3 的合法服务端调用（只交换元数据，不传字节）。complete 接 parts 列表；abort 用于取消。
tasks.details: 1) create：input { cid, bucket, key, contentType? }，调 createMultipartUpload，返回 { uploadId }；audit op='upload.create'；2) complete：input { cid, bucket, key, uploadId, parts: [{partNumber:number, etag:string}] }，parts.sort by partNumber，调 completeMultipartUpload，返回 { etag, location }；audit op='upload.complete'；3) abort：input { cid, bucket, key, uploadId }，调 abortMultipartUpload，204；audit op='upload.abort'；4) 限流归 'write' 类（600/min/user）；5) CSRF 必须。
tasks.testStrategy: Vitest mock S3：create 返回 uploadId；complete 校验 parts 顺序；abort 调用 SDK 一次；input 校验 parts 至少 1 项；E2E：上传 200MB 文件能成功 create -> upload-part(presigned) -> complete。

tasks.title: Upload Queue store + dispatcher（3×3 并发）
tasks.description: Zustand store 管理上传任务的内存状态机；dispatcher 协程：3 个文件并发，每文件 3 个 part 并发；不持久化（关页面=丢失）；取消即 abort。
tasks.details: 1) stores/upload-queue.ts：task = { id, file, bucket, key, status: 'queued'|'preparing'|'uploading'|'completing'|'done'|'failed'|'canceled', uploadId?, parts: Map<number,{etag?, status}>, progress: {bytesUploaded, totalBytes} }；2) actions: enqueue, cancel, retry, removeDone；3) dispatcher：useEffect 在 layout 启动一个 worker loop，挑 status='queued' 的最早 3 个开跑；4) 单文件 flow：if size < 100MB -> presign put -> fetch PUT；else create multipart -> 切片 10MB part -> 每 part presign upload-part + fetch PUT，3 个并发 -> complete-multipart；5) ETag 从 response header 取（注意 R2 用 ETag header，可能带引号）；6) cancel: AbortController + 调 /api/r2/multipart/abort；7) Progress 用 XMLHttpRequest 而非 fetch（fetch 无上传进度）或用 ReadableStream 上传 + 计算字节数。
tasks.testStrategy: Vitest：单文件 < 100MB 走单 PUT 路径；> 100MB 走 multipart 路径，part 数 = ceil(size/10MB)；并发数测试：5 个文件入队同时只有 3 个进入 uploading；cancel 后 status='canceled' 且调了 abort 端点；E2E：拖 300MB 假文件成功上传到 R2。

tasks.title: Upload UI（拖拽 + 进度 + 取消）
tasks.description: Dropzone 组件接收拖拽文件入队；底部 fixed Upload Tray 显示进度条/暂停（V1 不做，灰显）/取消/重试；新任务 toast 提示。
tasks.details: 1) components/features/upload/Dropzone.tsx：监听 dragover/drop，多文件支持，文件大小校验（单文件 < 5GB R2 限制）；2) UploadTray 固定底部，列表项展示文件名/进度条(shadcn Progress)/速率/剩余时间/Cancel 按钮；3) 任务完成后 5 秒自动从列表移除（done 状态 fade out）；4) 失败显示 Retry 按钮；5) 关闭页面前若有 in-flight 任务 window.onbeforeunload 提示；6) Tray 折叠/展开切换。
tasks.testStrategy: Playwright：拖一个小文件成功上传，进度条到 100%；拖一个大文件中途点 Cancel，UI 状态变 'Canceled' 且后端 abort 被调；同时拖 5 个文件，Tray 显示 3 个 uploading + 2 个 queued。

tasks.title: 单文件下载（presigned GET）
tasks.description: 对象表格 Download 按钮：调 /api/r2/presign op='get' ttl=900 -> 浏览器 window.location 或 a[download] 触发原生下载。
tasks.details: 1) hooks/use-download.ts：useMutation 调 presign 拿 URL；2) 触发：创建临时 <a href={url} download={filename}> 调 click() 后 remove；3) 大文件浏览器原生下载管理；4) 失败 toast；5) 不做断点续下载（V1）。
tasks.testStrategy: Playwright：点 Download 按钮 -> 浏览器开始下载 -> 文件内容 SHA256 与上传一致。

tasks.title: 删除 API（HMAC confirm token）+ 删除 UI（typed 确认）
tasks.description: POST /api/r2/delete/prepare 返 confirmToken (HMAC, 5min)；POST /api/r2/delete 校验 token 后批量 delete；UI 弹窗要求输入 bucket 名才能确认。
tasks.details: 1) /api/r2/delete/prepare：input { cid, bucket, keys[] }, 计算 keysHash = sha256(sort(keys).join('\n')), token = base64url(HMAC-SHA256(SERVER_SECRET, `${userId}|${bucket}|${keysHash}|${exp}`)) + '.' + exp(unix s)，返回 { confirmToken, expiresAt }；2) /api/r2/delete：input { cid, bucket, keys[], confirmToken }，重算 hash 比对 + 校验 exp 未过期 + HMAC 相等 -> 调 deleteObjects -> 返回 { deleted, errors }；不递归（V1）；3) UI: DeleteDialog 展示 keys 列表（最多 20，超过显示 "...及 N 个其他"）+ input 要求 type exact bucket name + 提交按钮 disabled 直到 type 正确 -> 先 prepare 再 confirm；4) audit op='object.delete' 每个 key 一行（或一行带 count）。
tasks.testStrategy: Vitest：token 过期返 400；token 篡改返 400；keys 顺序不影响 hash（sort）；E2E：选 3 个对象删除，弹窗输入桶名 -> 删除成功 -> 列表刷新；不输或输错桶名按钮 disabled。

tasks.title: 分享链接 API + UI（1h/1d/7d）
tasks.description: POST /api/share/create 生成 presigned GET + 入库 shares 表；GET /api/share 列表分页（按 expires_at 过滤未过期）；DELETE /api/share/:id 仅删记录（协议层不能撤）。
tasks.details: 1) create：input { cid, bucket, key, ttlSeconds: z.union([z.literal(3600), z.literal(86400), z.literal(604800)]) }，调 presignGet(ttl)，url_hash = sha256(url)，INSERT shares -> 返回 { id, url, expiresAt }；audit op='share.create'；限流 30/min/user；2) list：GET ?cursor=，WHERE user_id=? AND expires_at > now() ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50 + cursor 分页；返回 { items: [{id, bucket, key, expiresAt, ttlSeconds, createdAt}], nextCursor }（不返回 url）；3) delete：DELETE 行（URL 实际仍可用直到 expires_at，UI 明示）；audit op='share.delete'；4) UI：对象行 Share 按钮 -> Dialog 选 1h/1d/7d -> 生成 -> 显示 URL + Copy 按钮 + 过期倒计时；5) /(dashboard)/shares 页面列表已生成的分享，可删除记录但 UI 警示 'URL 实际仍可用直到过期时间'。
tasks.testStrategy: Vitest：ttlSeconds 不在 3 个值内返 400；create 后 GET list 看到记录；过期记录不再返回；E2E：生成分享，复制 URL，匿名浏览器访问 URL 能下载文件；超过 ttl 后访问 R2 返 403。

tasks.details:
1) 判定 mime：根据 key 后缀（.png/.jpg/.gif/.webp/.svg -> image；.txt/.json/.md/.log/.csv/.xml/.yaml -> text；其他 -> 'Preview not available'）；2) PreviewDialog 内部调 useQuery 拿 presigned GET URL（ttl 5min）；3) image: ；4) text: fetch(url, { headers: { Range: 'bytes=0-1048575' } }) -> response.text() -> 
 显示，超过 1MB 顶部 Banner 'Showing first 1 MB of N MB'；5) 不做语法高亮（V2）；6) 大图（>10MB）loading skeleton。

tasks.title: 审计日志查看器
tasks.description: GET /api/audit ?cursor=&op=&bucket= 列表分页；UI /(dashboard)/audit 页表格展示。
tasks.details: 1) /api/audit/route.ts (GET)：WHERE user_id=? AND (op=? optional) AND (bucket=? optional) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100 + cursor (用 created_at + id 复合 cursor)；2) UI: AuditTable 列 Time / Op (badge) / Bucket / Key / Status / IP；3) Op 下拉筛选（含所有枚举）；Bucket 输入框筛选；4) 不做导出（V1）。
tasks.testStrategy: Vitest：分页 cursor 正确；筛选 op='object.delete' 只返回对应行；E2E：执行一次删除后审计页能看到该记录。

tasks.title: Vitest 单元测试套件
tasks.description: 覆盖 crypto/auth/r2/api/audit/rate-limit 核心模块，目标 80%+ 行覆盖；route handler 用 mock D1 + mock S3 测。
tasks.details: 1) vitest.config.ts：environment='node'（edge runtime 用 miniflare 适配器更佳，可装 @cloudflare/vitest-pool-workers）；2) 用 better-sqlite3 in-memory 跑 drizzle 迁移作为 D1 替身；3) S3Client 用 aws-sdk-client-mock 包；4) tests/unit/crypto/aes-gcm.test.ts、auth/password.test.ts、api/csrf.test.ts、api/rate-limit.test.ts、r2/presign.test.ts、r2/control.test.ts、api/connections.test.ts、api/presign.test.ts、api/delete.test.ts；5) coverage 通过 v8 provider；6) CI 时 typecheck + lint + test 串行。
tasks.testStrategy: `pnpm test` 通过；`pnpm test --coverage` 行覆盖 ≥80%（crypto 和 api 模块 ≥95%）。

tasks.title: Playwright E2E 关键流 + 部署/CORS 文档
tasks.description: Playwright 覆盖：登录、添加 connection、浏览桶、上传（小/大）、下载、删除（typed 确认）、生成分享。CLAUDE.md 补 Security Invariant #3 豁免脚注；README 加 R2 CORS 配置示例 + multipart lifecycle 提示。
tasks.details: 1) playwright.config.ts：webServer 跑 `pnpm preview`（wrangler 本地 D1）；baseURL=http://localhost:8788；2) tests/e2e/login.spec.ts、connections.spec.ts、browse-upload-download.spec.ts、delete.spec.ts、share.spec.ts；3) fixtures：登录态可复用 storageState；4) 用真实 R2 测试桶（CI 用一个专用 throwaway 桶，凭证存 GH Secrets）或 minio 本地 S3 兼容服务；5) 文档：docs/r2-cors.md 给出标准 CORS JSON（AllowedOrigins=[NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL], AllowedMethods=[GET, PUT], AllowedHeaders=[*], MaxAgeSeconds=3600）；6) docs/multipart-cleanup.md 推荐 R2 lifecycle rule 'AbortIncompleteMultipartUpload after 7 days'；7) CLAUDE.md Security Invariant #3 加脚注：'Exception: control-plane R2 calls (list, delete, create/complete/abort multipart upload) MAY be made server-side as they only exchange metadata, not object bytes.'；8) 部署 runbook：env 配置（ENCRYPTION_KEY=`openssl rand -base64 32`）、首次 admin seed 步骤、D1 migration 应用、wrangler pages deploy。
tasks.testStrategy: `pnpm test:e2e` 全部通过；本地 `pnpm preview` 能完整走通 login -> upload 100MB 文件 -> 删除 -> 分享；wrangler pages deploy --dry-run 通过；CLAUDE.md 修改后 grep 验证脚注存在；README 含 CORS 示例。
